data.title: Update project docs to reflect stack-aware architect-foundation and hashFiles() CI skeletons
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and any existing docs that describe architect-foundation as stack-agnostic to reflect that it now pre-fills commands.* and generates hashFiles()-conditioned CI skeletons for Python, Node/JS, and Ruby stacks.

**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md (architect-foundation notes); KNOWN-ISSUES.md (if issues surfaced during implementation)
- OUT: Creating new docs; modifying INSTALL.md (Story E3 handles that)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md or referenced docs accurately describe architect-foundation as stack-aware with per-stack defaults

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
